metadata.title: Prestige Auto Body Inc. - Collision Repair & Auto Painting
metadata.description: Professional auto body repair, collision repair, and auto painting services. We work with all insurance companies.

collision.title: Collision Repair
collision.description: Expert collision repair services to restore your vehicle to pre-accident condition with factory specifications.

autoBody.title: Auto Body Work
autoBody.description: Complete auto body services including dent removal, frame straightening, and panel replacement.

painting.title: Auto Painting
painting.description: Professional painting services with precision color matching and premium, durable finishes.

experience.title: 20+ Years Experience
experience.description: Two decades of trusted auto body repair excellence in the Silver Spring community.

certified.title: I-CAR & ASE Certified
certified.description: Our technicians hold the highest industry certifications and ongoing training.

insurance.title: All Insurance Accepted
insurance.description: We work directly with all major insurance companies for hassle-free claims.

quality.title: Lifetime Guarantee
quality.description: Every repair comes with our comprehensive lifetime warranty on workmanship.

equipment.title: State-of-the-Art Facility
equipment.description: Modern equipment and technology for precision repairs and color matching.

satisfaction.title: 4.7 Star Rating
satisfaction.description: Trusted by over 1,000 satisfied customers with exceptional reviews.

towing.title: 24/7 Emergency Towing
towing.description: Stranded? Our professional tow truck operators are available around the clock to get you and your vehicle to safety.

video.title: See Our Work
video.description: Watch how we transform damaged vehicles back to their original condition.

quote.title: Get a Free Estimate
quote.description: Ready to restore your vehicle? Get a free, no-obligation estimate today.
